creator: i.vaudrey@bigfoot.com
text:
This is a port of vilearn, an interactive
	tutorial for the vi editor. Very useful
	for vi newbies.

	I have placed the port in the editors
	category, but I think it really belongs
	in the (currently non-existent)
	documentation category.

Fix: 

Please review and commit the port at
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/vilearn-port.tar.gz
